top_stories.title: TinyFish AI Releases Full Web Infrastructure Platform for AI Agents: Search, Fetch, Browser, and Agent Under One API Key
top_stories.description: AI agents struggle with tasks that require interacting with the live web — fetching a competitor’s pricing page, extracting structured data from a JavaScript-heavy dashboard, or automating a multi-step workflow on a real site. The tooling has been fragmented, requiring teams to stitch together separate providers for search, browser automation, and content retrieval. TinyFish, a […] The post TinyFish AI Releases Full Web Infrastructure Platform for AI Agents: Search, Fetch, Browser, and Agent...

top_stories.title: From LLMs to hallucinations, here’s a simple guide to common AI terms
top_stories.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
top_stories.author: Natasha Lomas, Romain Dillet, Kyle Wiggers, Lucas Ropek
top_stories.content: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

top_stories.title: Customized Amazon Nova models improve molecular-property prediction in drug discovery
top_stories.description: A single, optimized LLM unifies what previously required multiple models and can serve as a reasoning partner for medical chemists.
top_stories.content: A single, optimized LLM unifies what previously required multiple models and can serve as a reasoning partner for medical chemists.

top_stories.title: Introducing stateful MCP client capabilities on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime
top_stories.description: In this post, you will learn how to build stateful MCP servers that request user input during execution, invoke LLM sampling for dynamic content generation, and stream progress updates for long-running tasks. You will see code examples for each capability and deploy a working stateful MCP server to Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime.
top_stories.author: Evandro Franco
top_stories.content: In this post, you will learn how to build stateful MCP servers that request user input during execution, invoke LLM sampling for dynamic content generation, and stream progress updates for long-running tasks. You will see code examples for each capability and deploy a working stateful MCP server to Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime.

top_stories.title: Spring AI SDK for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is now Generally Available
top_stories.description: With the new Spring AI AgentCore SDK, you can build production-ready AI agents and run them on the highly scalable AgentCore Runtime. The Spring AI AgentCore SDK is an open source library that brings Amazon Bedrock AgentCore capabilities into Spring AI. In this post, we build an AI agent starting with a chat endpoint, then adding streaming responses, conversation memory, and tools for web browsing and code execution.
top_stories.author: Andrei Shakirin
